items.body:
## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage

This is a **tracking issue** for the MPG (Management Plane Generator / TypeSpec) migration of the `Azure.ResourceManager.RecoveryServicesBackup` SDK — a sub-issue of #53864 (Azure Mgmt Generator migration).

**SDK location:** `sdk/recoveryservices-backup/`  
**CODEOWNERS owner:** `@Daya-Patil`  
**Parent tracking issue:** #53864

<details>
<summary>📋 Migration Task Checklist</summary>

Based on the standard MPG migration workflow, here are the typical sub-tasks:

- [ ] Locate or create a TypeSpec spec for RecoveryServicesBackup in `azure-rest-api-specs`
- [ ] Create/update `tsp-location.yaml` in `sdk/recoveryservices-backup/Azure.ResourceManager.RecoveryServicesBackup/`
- [ ] Run TypeSpec code generation locally via the Azure Mgmt Generator
- [ ] Address any breaking changes vs. the existing AutoRest-generated SDK (check `CannotRemoveBaseTypeOrInterface`, removed members, renamed types, etc.)
- [ ] Apply SDK-side customizations (`[CodeGenType]`, `[CodeGenSuppress]`, `[CodeGenMember]`) or TypeSpec `client.tsp` decorators (`@`@clientName``, `@`@access``, `@`@alternateType``, `@`@hierarchyBuilding``) as needed to mitigate breaking changes
- [ ] Run `pwsh eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 recoveryservices-backup` to regenerate the public API listing
- [ ] Run `dotnet build` and `dotnet test` for the package to validate correctness
- [ ] Update `CHANGELOG.md` with any breaking changes or new features
- [ ] Open a PR and request review

</details>

<details>
<summary>🔧 Debugging & Tooling Tips</summary>

- **Generation script:** Use `eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/eng/scripts/Generate.ps1` for local generation validation.
- **Local debugging:** `GenerateFromSpecLocal.ps1` allows printf-level debugging of generator changes by swapping DLLs in `dist/generator/`.
- **Breaking changes:** Run `dotnet build` and look for `ApiCompat` violations. Common issues include missing base types, renamed properties, or changed return types.
- **Wire path attributes:** If the existing package uses `WirePathAttribute`, set `enable-wire-path-attribute: true` in `tspconfig.yaml`.
- **Skill available:** Use the `mpg-sdk-migration` Copilot skill for step-by-step migration guidance.
- **Breaking change mitigation:** Use the `mitigate-breaking-changes` Copilot skill for patterns on handling SDK-side compatibility fixes.

</details>

<details>
<summary>🔗 Useful Resources</summary>

- [MPG Migration Skill docs](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/.github/skills/mpg-sdk-migration/)
- [Mitigate Breaking Changes Skill](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/.github/skills/mitigate-breaking-changes/)
- [Parent tracking issue #53864](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/53864)
- [Completed migrations tracking #55080](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/55080)
- [azure-rest-api-specs RecoveryServicesBackup TypeSpec](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/tree/main/specification/recoveryservicesbackup)

</details>
